	dec @R1
	nop
	ljmp jump_D321

	nop
	nop
	orl A, R6
	dec R1
	nop
	ljmp jump_D321

	nop

	dec R3
	nop
	ljmp jump_D321

	nop
	orl A, R6
	ajmp jump_7100

	ljmp jump_C321

	nop

	nop

end
